name: Lyra
text: Look at the horizon, Cain. Everything is so quiet from up here. No halls, no whispers... just us.

name: Cain
text: It’s peaceful. I see why you like coming up here so much.

name: Lyra
text: Cain? If I told you the sky was yellow today... would you believe me?

name: Cain
text: If you say it is, then it is. I trust your eyes more than mine anyway.

name: Lyra
text: ...Thank you. That's all I needed to hear.
